mapper.sql: id, task_no, scenario_id, scenario_snapshot_json, creator_id, algorithm, training_config_json, priority, status, progress, retry_count, max_retry_count, idempotency_key, request_hash, error_message, lock_version, submitted_at, started_at, finished_at, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO experiment_task ( task_no, scenario_id, scenario_snapshot_json, creator_id, algorithm, training_config_json, priority, status, idempotency_key, request_hash, submitted_at ) VALUES ( #{taskNo}, #{scenarioId}, CAST(#{scenarioSnapshotJson} AS JSON), #{creatorId}, #{algorithm}, CAST(#{trainingConfigJson} AS JSON), #{priority}, #{status}, #{idempotencyKey}, #{requestHash}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3) )
mapper.select: SELECT FROM experiment_task WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM experiment_task WHERE ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.update: UPDATE experiment_task SET status = 'QUEUED', progress = 0, retry_count = retry_count + 1, error_message = NULL, started_at = NULL, finished_at = NULL, lock_version = lock_version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND creator_id = #{creatorId} AND lock_version = #{version} AND status = 'FAILED' AND retry_count < max_retry_count
UPDATE experiment_task SET status = 'QUEUED', lock_version = lock_version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'PENDING'

UPDATE experiment_task SET status = 'RUNNING', progress = 0, error_message = NULL, started_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3), finished_at = NULL, lock_version = lock_version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'QUEUED'

UPDATE experiment_task SET status = 'RUNNING', progress = 0, error_message = NULL, started_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3), finished_at = NULL, lock_version = lock_version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'QUEUED' AND retry_count = #{expectedRetryCount}
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM experiment_task WHERE status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY priority DESC, submitted_at ASC, id ASC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT id FROM experiment_task WHERE status = 'QUEUED' ORDER BY priority DESC, submitted_at ASC, id ASC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT status FROM experiment_task WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE experiment_task SET status = 'SUCCEEDED', progress = 100, error_message = NULL, finished_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3), lock_version = lock_version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'RUNNING'
UPDATE experiment_task SET status = 'FAILED', error_message = #{errorMessage}, finished_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3), lock_version = lock_version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'RUNNING'

UPDATE experiment_task SET status = 'FAILED', error_message = #{errorMessage}, finished_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3), lock_version = lock_version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND status IN ('PENDING', 'QUEUED') AND retry_count = #{expectedRetryCount}
